name: PFIZER INC
summary: Pfizer Inc. is a global biopharmaceutical company that discovers, develops, manufactures, and commercializes medicines and vaccines. Key products include Comirnaty (COVID-19 vaccine), Paxlovid (COVID-19 oral treatment), Prevnar family (pneumococcal vaccines), Vyndaqel family (transthyretin amyloid cardiomyopathy), and oncology products including antibody-drug conjugates acquired through Seagen. Pfizer operates across developed and emerging markets worldwide, with commercial operations spanning internal and alliance-based product portfolios.

products.name: Comirnaty
products.description: mRNA COVID-19 vaccine, first authorized in the U.S. in December 2020 under EUA.

products.name: Paxlovid
products.description: Oral COVID-19 treatment (nirmatrelvir/ritonavir tablets) authorized under EUA for high-risk patients.

products.name: Prevnar family
products.description: Pneumococcal vaccines including Prevnar 20/Prevenar 20 and Prevnar 13/Prevenar 13 for pediatric and adult use.

products.name: Vyndaqel family
products.description: Includes Vyndaqel, Vyndamax, and Vynmac for treatment of transthyretin amyloid cardiomyopathy (ATTR-CM).

products.name: Lipitor
products.description: Globally recognized branded cholesterol medication, formerly part of the Upjohn Business.

products.name: Antibody-Drug Conjugates (ADC)
products.description: Oncology platform acquired through Seagen Inc., targeting cancer treatment.

partnerships.description: Collaboration related to Comirnaty mRNA COVID-19 vaccine development and commercialization.
